beats.text: CARRICK PLANS TO INCLUDE HIM IN THE SQUAD
COVERING WORLD CUP ABSENTEES IN PRE-SEASON
THE NEXT STAR OFF THE ACADEMY LINE

caption: JJ Gabriel — 15 years old and reportedly set to travel with United's first team on pre-season tour this summer. The academy never stops producing. Who else from the youth team is ready to break through? 🔴 Per Goal.com.
